library.description: ملحق SDL3 الرسمي للصوت والمزج وتشغيل الملفات والمسارات الصوتية.

kind.description: استدعاءات تنفذ فعلاً، تغيّر حالة، أو تعيد نتيجة، أو تبني مورداً.

summary.purposeArabic: تستخدم هذه الدالة عندما تحتاج إلى تحميل الصوت playback SDL_IOStream داخل التطبيق أو داخل مسار التنفيذ المرتبط بها.
summary.whyUseArabic: القيمة الحقيقية هنا هي الأثر التنفيذي الذي يحدثه الاستدعاء أو النتيجة التي يعيدها إلى التطبيق.
summary.carriedValueArabic:
القيمة العملية لهذا الاستدعاء تظهر في ناتجه ( MIX_Audio *) Returns an audio object
that can be used to make sound on a mixer, or NULL on failure; call
SDL_GetError() for more information. وفي التغيير الذي يحدثه على المورد أو الحالة المرتبطة به.
summary.sourceDescription: Load audio for playback from an SDL_IOStream.

signature.raw: MIX_Audio * MIX_LoadAudio_IO(MIX_Mixer *mixer, SDL_IOStream *io, bool predecode, bool closeio);

parameters.name: mixer
parameters.descriptionArabic: يمثل المعامل mixer من النوع MIX_Mixer * القيمة أو المورد الذي يعتمد عليه هذا الاستدعاء.
parameters.originalDescription: a mixer this audio is intended to be used with. May be NULL.

parameters.name: io
parameters.descriptionArabic: يمثل المعامل io من النوع SDL_IOStream * القيمة أو المورد الذي يعتمد عليه هذا الاستدعاء.
parameters.originalDescription: the SDL_IOStream to load data from.

parameters.name: predecode
parameters.descriptionArabic: يمثل المعامل predecode من النوع bool القيمة أو المورد الذي يعتمد عليه هذا الاستدعاء.
parameters.originalDescription: if true, data will be fully uncompressed before returning.

parameters.name: closeio
parameters.descriptionArabic: يمثل المعامل closeio من النوع bool القيمة أو المورد الذي يعتمد عليه هذا الاستدعاء.
parameters.originalDescription:
true if SDL_mixer should close io before returning
(success or failure).

remarks:
In normal usage, apps should load audio once, maybe at startup, then
play it multiple times.

When loading audio, it will be cached fully in RAM in its original
data format. Each time it plays, the data will be decoded. For example,
an MP3 will be stored in memory in MP3 format and be decompressed on the
fly during playback. This is a tradeoff between i/o overhead and memory
usage.

If predecode is true, the data will be decompressed
during load and stored as raw PCM data. This might dramatically increase
loading time and memory usage, but there will be no need to decompress
data during playback.

(One could also use MIX_SetTrackIOStream () to bypass
loading the data into RAM upfront at all, but this offers still
different tradeoffs. The correct approach depends on the app's needs and
employing different approaches in different situations can make
sense.)

MIX_Audio objects can be shared between
mixers. This function takes a MIX_Mixer , to
imply this is the most likely place it will be used and loading should
try to match its audio format, but the resulting audio can be used
elsewhere. If mixer is NULL, SDL_mixer will set reasonable
defaults.

Once a MIX_Audio is created, it can be
assigned to a MIX_Track with MIX_SetTrackAudio (), or played without
any management with MIX_PlayAudio ().

When done with a MIX_Audio , it can be
freed with MIX_DestroyAudio ().

This function loads data from an SDL_IOStream. There is also a
version that loads from a path on the filesystem ( MIX_LoadAudio ()), and one that accepts
properties for ultimate control ( MIX_LoadAudioWithProperties ()).

The SDL_IOStream provided must be able to seek, or loading will fail.
If the stream can't seek (data is coming from an HTTP connection, etc),
consider caching the data to memory or disk first and creating a new
stream to read from there.
details.returns:
( MIX_Audio *) Returns an audio object
that can be used to make sound on a mixer, or NULL on failure; call
SDL_GetError() for more information.
details.threadSafety: It is safe to call this function from any thread.
